case_title: JAVIER RODRIGUEZ ZEPEDA VS. GREEN BAY JANITORIAL INC., et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZEPEDA, JAVIER RODRIGUEZ AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN BAY JANITORIAL INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION WEST CLEANING INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION MARTINIZ, GERMAN JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
